daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is basically handing you permission to take up space and be unapologetically yourself. Lean into whatever feels most authentically you today—the universe is listening.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a softness in the air around your connections. If you've been meaning to have a real conversation with someone, today's the day. Vulnerability hits different when it's genuine.
daily.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. Trust those unconventional ideas brewing in your head—the ones that feel slightly risky. Your boldness is actually your superpower today, so channel it into something that matters to you.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. Whether that's dancing in your room, stretching, or a walk—listen to what genuinely energizes you rather than what you think you *should* do.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to lean into your authenticity, Leo. You're radiating a magnetic frequency that draws the right people closer. Trust the momentum building around you—something real is shifting.
weekly.love: Your vibe is irresistible rn, but the universe is asking you to be intentional about who gets access. Quality over quantity applies to connections too. If you're coupled up, vulnerability hits different this week.
weekly.career: Mercury's supporting your communication game hard. This is your moment to pitch ideas, have those convos you've been postponing, or just let your creative energy flow naturally. Your voice matters more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, stretch, walk in nature—anything that reconnects you with feeling alive. Energy levels are steady; honor what your system actually needs.
